text:
Created attachment 252777
Poudriere build log

checking whether mixed C/Fortran code can be run...
configure: WARNING: cannot run mixed C/Fortran code
configure: error: Maybe check LDFLAGS for paths to Fortran libraries?
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.

The issue is somewhat known around, just don't know how it could be fixed in FreeBSD.
